narratives.full_description:
Panel Discussion, hosting a guest from the legendary Tresor Berlin together with Hayfilm Cluster

Together with Hayfilm Cluster, we gathered at the National Library of Armenia to host a guest from the legendary Tresor Berlin.

Tresor x MOCT 
 Tresor x MOCT 
 
 Together with Hayfilm Cluster, we gathered at the National Library of Armenia to host a guest from the legendary Tresor Berlin. 
 
 Paul Cinske, invited for the TRESORxMOCT event and curated by Anna Petrosyan, shared insights on how electronic music is documented and kept alive. 
 
 Paul is a Creative Director and Event Producer based in Berlin, working across club culture, festivals, and large-scale cultural programs at Tresor and formerly its sibling venue, OHM. 
 His practice focuses on long-term artistic strategy, production systems, and building sustainable platforms for contemporary electronic music and performance. 
 
 The conversation ended with a great Q&A session. 
 These kinds of discussions will continue regularly throughout the year.
